sglang.title: fix(logging): use Display format for model_id instead of Debug
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Replace {:?} (Debug format) with {} (Display format) for model_id in log messages to avoid printing Some("model") instead of just "model".
Use the existing UNKNOWN_MODEL_ID constant for consistency when model_id is None.

sglang.title: Add unified metrics collection framework (v1)
sglang.author: harvenstar
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Implement dump_metric() function for test metrics collection:

Outputs to JSONL (${SGLANG_TEST_METRICS_OUTPUT}.${pid}.jsonl)
Outputs to stdout ([METRIC] format)
Schema: required {filename, test_case, metric_name, value}
Optional: {ts, labels}
Supports int/float/str, coerces bool to int
Auto-captures

sglang.title: Make personal configs optional in SGLang's official docker image.
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
The tmux/vim/git configs are highly personal. We therefore avoid introducing breaking changes via default settings.
Technically, such configs can still be shipped as defaults, but any change that affects default behavior must be proposed in a separate PR and discussed explicitly.
The configs current

sglang.title: [VLM] Support request level max_dynamic_patch for OpenAI request
sglang.author: yuan-luo
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

In the InternVL model, max_dynamic_patch is a configuration parameter that defines the maximum number of image patches (or regions) to dynamically extract and process from an image, allowing the model to handle varying image resolutions and content by focusing on important areas, typical

sglang.title: [model-gateway] Clear architectual debt in responses API
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR tries to clear the multiple duplicated and circular imports in the current responses API design. It includes:

ensure_client_from_request_tools is defined in openai router, but used in all routers.
MAX_ITERATIONS or MAX_TOOL_ITERATIONS are defined in all routers.
McpLoopConfig is
